item.description:
# Everything Clipboard 1.1.0
- Fixes selection for copied video and file items in the clipboard history list. - Keeps toolbar search open while typing. - Prevents background clipboard capture from bringing Everything Clipboard to the front. - Adds dark-mode control, default dark appearance, tabbed settings, and icon-and-text toolbar defaults. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.0.8
- Fixes selection for copied video and file items in the clipboard history list. - Keeps list-row clicks reliable by leaving media dragging in the selected item's detail preview. - Preserves the menu-bar update command and launch-time Sparkle background check. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.0.7
- Adds Check for Updates to the menu-bar command list. - Enables an immediate Sparkle background update check on launch. - Aligns the visible patch release with Sparkle's internal updater build number. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.
